title: plantago major f. vulgaris
intro: Plantago major f. vulgaris, commonly known as common plantain, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plantago major f. vulgaris include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of colds and coughs. The herbal preparations of common plantain include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
